title: Hot Work Near Flammable Atmospheres
text: Hot work shall not be carried out in areas where flammable gases, vapours or combustible dusts are present unless adequate controls are in place.

title: Gas Monitoring Requirements
text: Continuous gas monitoring is required in confined spaces and areas with potential gas leaks. Exceedance of threshold values must trigger alarms and evacuation procedures.

title: Permit to Work Control
text: Work involving risk must be controlled by a written Permit to Work system; permits must be available on site and audited.
